CustomField.description: Connect this Credit Memo to the Payable record generated through the Convert to Payable process. [LOAD:Optional] [JUSTIFICATION:Populate when CM is converted to Payable] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Links this Credit Memo to the Payable record created through the Convert to Payable process.
CustomField.label: Linked Payable
